Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are available at: http://dataq.ncpdp.org/. 

Taxonomy codes are assigned by the National Uniform Claim Committee (NUCC). For a current list of 
NUCC Provider Taxonomy Codes and Descriptions reference the Code Sets link at 
http://www.nucc.org/.
